'''Miko''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Sorella system/Legends|Sorella system]].<ref name="D200" />

==History==
It was part of the territory of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Delurin]]. It was also the [[Mikoan]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. The Mikoans rebelled against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and were subjugated by Delurin using the ''[[Galaxy Dragon]]'' to bombard their planet with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] and [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]] until the they begged for peace. Some time after the death of [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor Palpatine]], a team of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] diplomats approached the planet to convince them to join the Republic. Unfortunately, [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] Delurin appeared in the ''Dragon'', once again threatening to use force. Some of the diplomatic team stayed on the planet to convince the Mikoans to rebel, while others left the system to gain military help. After this, the planet joined the New Republic.
